expectedClassifications.notes: Mirrors initialRowSelection (derived from props via useMemo) into local state via setRowSelection. This is the classic prop-to-state sync anti-pattern: the local state is always a stale copy of a value computable from props. The interpreter classifies as NECESSARY because it sees only a state setter with no fetch/async/prop mirror pattern -- but the dependency (initialRowSelection) is itself derived from props, making this derived state. Source: WorkstreamsTable.tsx
